name: Dr. Hofnarr ~|Madness Combat|~
description:
Dr. Hofnarr from Madness Combat

The plot is free, you can do whatever you want with him, there is no initial message.

This Dr. Hofnarr is more based on the game, but I added some more stuff from myself, so it may not be completely canon. This is Dr. Hofnarr before the Fall of Nexus City. I also added some more information about the world and secondary characters: Sheriff and Dr. Christoff. The bot doesn't always add the secondary characters you want to the narrative, so I suggest adding “Play the role of Hofnarr and ...” at the end of your messages. You can also choose not to communicate with the bot directly, but act as a narrator, the characters within the bot interact well with each other. Also the bot can sometimes write for you if there are a lot of characters, there's nothing I can do about that. If you notice any error, let me know, I'll try to fix it.

The author of the artwork is unknown to me, so if you know anything, please let me know.
creator: Big_Zelibobka
